how it started

The Red Thread

17 March

The Confession

The day the words finally left my chest and found their way to you — nervous, honest, and completely certain underneath all the nerves.

19 March

Us, Officially

Two days later, you said yes to being ours. The exact moment the thread stopped being an idea and became something we could both hold onto.

Today

Five Months In

Still counting, still smiling at my phone like an idiot every time you text. Choosing you, every single day of my life.

us, in no particular order

A Few Moments

tap anywhere to close
words for you

Two Small Poems

17th of March

I practiced calm and lost it at your door, the words arrived before I planned them to. Not smooth, not clever, true is all I wore — and still, somehow, that honesty reached you. The evening did not pause or hold its breath, the sky above forgot to interfere, it simply let two nervous hearts confess that everything they wanted, was right here.

— Your Smoll Baby

For Subhanwita

You are the pause I didn't know I needed, the soft yes tucked inside a busy day. Five months of ordinary hours, unheeded by time, made golden simply by your stay. No grand event, no calendar of firsts, just morning texts and evenings saved for you — of every quiet gladness, kept and nursed, you are the steady, favourite one I choose.

— Your Smoll Baby
one more thing

Before You Go

There's a message I've been meaning to say properly. Go on, tap the heart.

Subbuuuu 💖,

Five months ago I was nervous enough to almost not say it. Today I'd say it again in front of anyone. You make ordinary days feel worth remembering. Happy 5 months — here's to all the ones still coming.

I love you.

Subhasis & Subhanwita
since 19 march · still counting
